entry.title: Lissy93 released 2.1.0 at Lissy93/web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 released 2.1.0 of Lissy93/web-check · May 7, 2026 14:01
Lissy93 / /Lissy93/web-check
Web Check V2.1.0

What's Changed

  • Update firewall.js, add QRATOR WAF by @n0a in #137
  • Update firewall.js, add ddos-guard WAF by @n0a in #143
  • CICD: bumped GHA versions by @vitalykarasik in #145
  • Sort openPorts and fail…
Read more
Contributors
  • +7

entry.title: Lissy93 closed an issue in web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed an issue in Lissy93/web-check · May 7, 2026 13:53
Adding WHOIS API from ip2whois.com #141
IP2Whois.com has an API for getting WHOIS data at https://www.ip2whois.com/developers-api. Perhaps, you can consider adding that API into your code.

entry.title: Lissy93 closed an issue in web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed an issue in Lissy93/web-check · May 7, 2026 13:53
There might be an issue with information leakage. #110
Because these query interfaces all carry an API key, there's a high likelihood of the key being misused. e.g Shodan
3 comments

entry.title: Lissy93 contributed to Lissy93/web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 merged Lissy93/web-check#295 · May 7, 2026 13:53
Reliability improvments and fixes #295

Overview

This PR fixes a bunch of user-reported issues, upgrades dependencies, and applies some performance optimizations + robustness improvements…
